codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All 4 new lecture modules (JavaScript DOM, JavaScript Events, JavaScript Classes, HTML Forms) were added to lecture-content.html with comprehensive coverage of all expected topics, interactive demos, and proper navigation integration.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md states '53 root-level HTML files in slides/' and '19 root-level HTML files in slides/New/' but actual inventory shows only 28 and 14 respectively. This discrepancy exists in AGENTS.md but did not affect this feature's implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: slides-inventory.json shows 28 files in slides/ and 14 in slides/New/ - this was created by an earlier feature (inventory-slides-folder)

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. All 4 required lecture modules were added to lecture-content.html with proper topic coverage, code examples, interactive demos, and navigation updates. The js-dom section (line 3849) covers DOM tree structure, querying, modifying, traversing, and styles. The js-events section (line 4123) covers addEventListener, event object, bubbling/capturing, common events, and preventDefault. The js-classes section (line 4410) covers class declaration, constructor, instance/static methods, inheritance with extends, getters/setters. The html-forms section (line 4666) covers form elements, input types, validation, and submission handling. Sidebar navigation and sections array were properly updated. Code quality follows existing patterns.
